stories.title: CPSC Warning — Stop Using "Relaxing Baby" Swim Floats Immediately (Drowning Death)

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
CPSC Warning: Stop using "Relaxing Baby" swim floats. A 2-year-old has died. The seller is ignoring CPSC. These were sold on Amazon for kids ages 3-36 months. Puncture and dispose — do not sell or give away.

#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Swim season is coming. If you have a "Relaxing Baby" float at home — blue or green, bought on Amazon — stop using it now. CPSC says it can flip and drown infants and toddlers. One child already died. Destroy it.

#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: Stop Using "Relaxing Baby" Swim Floats Now — CPSC Warning After Child Drowning Death

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
"Relaxing Baby" Swim Float Warning

**Image Concept 1 — Social (1200x675)**
- **Prompt:** A split-tone composition with a warning visual feel: top half features a calm, bright blue backyard pool surface with gentle ripples and afternoon sunlight, soft and inviting. Bottom third is a clean pale grey background with no objects. The mood transitions from calm at top to serious caution at bottom. No text, no products, no people. Light, airy color palette with subtle amber-red warmth at the lower edge. Art style: clean editorial lifestyle photography. Wide bottom margin for Canva overlay text.
- **Status:** not_started

**Image Concept 2 — Social (1200x675)**
- **Prompt:** A stylized top-down view of a backyard pool or inflatable splash pad area during golden hour. A swimsuit folded on the pool edge, a sunscreen bottle, and a towel are visible at the top. The bottom third is clear pale blue gradient with no objects, ready for text overlay. Warm summer tones. No children, no adults, no recognizable product shapes. Art style: lifestyle flat lay. Clean visual space at bottom third.
- **Status:** not_started

---

stories.title: Bellabu Bear Children's Sherpa Robes Recalled — Burn Hazard

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
Recall: Bellabu Bear sherpa robes for kids — burn hazard. Fails flammability standards. PAW Patrol, Minecraft, Batman prints included. Sold at Saks and online ~$60, 2024-2025. Full refund available.

#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: Bellabu Bear Recalls Kids' Sherpa Robes — PAW Patrol, Minecraft Prints Fail Burn Test

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
Bellabu Bear Robes Recall

**Image Concept 1 — Social (1200x675)**
- **Prompt:** A cozy bathroom scene: folded soft robes in neutral tones (cream, grey, muted blue) stacked on a bathroom shelf or towel bar. No characters, no logos, no brand identifiers. Warm bathroom lighting, clean white towels in background. Soft sherpa texture visible. The bottom quarter of the image is a clean white or very light grey margin suitable for text overlay. Art style: warm editorial home photography. No people visible.
- **Status:** not_started

**Image Concept 2 — Social (1200x675)**
- **Prompt:** A bedroom closet scene showing neatly hung children's garments — soft, neutral colors. One area is clearly empty or highlighted with a subtle visual empty-space cue. No characters, logos, or product text visible anywhere. Warm indoor lighting, clean composition. Bottom third is a very light neutral gradient with ample space for Canva text overlay. Art style: lifestyle home organization photography.
- **Status:** not_started

---

stories.title: D49 Opening Two New Early Childhood Classrooms at Student Success Center for 2026-27

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
D49 is opening 2 new early childhood classrooms at the Student Success Center for the 2026-27 school year. Full-day preschool also available. East-side COS families — enrollment planning starts now.

#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: D49 Is Adding Two New Early Childhood Classrooms at Student Success Center for Fall 2026

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
D49 ECE Classrooms

**Image Concept 1 — Social (1200x675)**
- **Prompt:** A bright, cheerful early childhood classroom scene with small wooden chairs and tables, colorful but simple learning materials, books on low shelves, natural light from large windows. The room is empty of people, giving a sense of "ready and waiting." Warm tones, primary colors in the decor. The bottom third of the image is a clean white or soft yellow floor space suitable for text. Art style: editorial lifestyle classroom photography. No people, no school logos, no identifiable text on walls.
- **Status:** not_started

**Image Concept 2 — Social (1200x675)**
- **Prompt:** An exterior view of a modern school building exterior in morning light, surrounded by Colorado landscape — blue skies, Rocky Mountain foothills visible in the distance. Clean, welcoming architecture. No signage visible. Bottom third of image is blue sky with ample space for text overlay. Art style: editorial architectural photography, Colorado setting.
- **Status:** not_started

stories.title: Bear Creek Nature Center April Events — Outdoor Programs for COS Families

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Bear Creek Nature Center April programs:

4/10: Nature Tots (2-3 yr olds), $3
4/17: Free Literacy Event for deaf + HoH families
4/23: Homeschool programs, $4

Pre-register required. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: Bear Creek Nature Center April Programs: What COS Families Should Know Right Now

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
Bear Creek Nature Center April Events

**Image Concept 1 — Social (1200x675)**
- **Prompt:** A spring forest trail scene in Colorado — green ponderosa pines, patches of wildflowers, dappled sunlight filtering through branches. A wooden nature center building is partially visible in the background. The foreground has a gravel path and a wooden interpretive sign (blank, no text). Bottom third of image is forest floor with clean grassy area suitable for Canva overlay. Color palette: natural greens, warm amber sunlight. Art style: nature photography, outdoor recreation. No people.
- **Status:** not_started

**Image Concept 2 — Social (1200x675)**
- **Prompt:** Close-up nature detail: a child's small hand (diverse skin tone, no face visible) touching the bark of a large tree, surrounded by spring greenery and small wildflowers. The hand is centered in the upper two-thirds; the bottom third is soft green grass slightly out of focus for text overlay. Warm natural lighting, shallow depth of field. Art style: lifestyle nature photography. Feels warm and inviting.
- **Status:** not_started

---

stories.title: Research Roundup — Why Outdoor Play This Spring Matters for Your Kids

x_posts.label: Post 5-1
x_posts.text:
Research says: kids who play in green spaces have lower anxiety, better focus, and — for those with ADHD — milder symptoms. COS has hundreds of miles of trails and parks. Spring is the best time to use them.

#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

x_posts.label: Post 5-2
x_posts.text:
The science is clear: outdoor time is good for kids. Better mood, less stress, improved focus. Colorado Springs parents have one of the best built-in prescriptions around — open the door and go outside.

#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: The Research Is Clear: Your Kids Need More Outdoor Time This Spring

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
Outdoor Play Research Roundup

**Image Concept 1 — Social (1200x675)**
- **Prompt:** Two children (diverse, one boy and one girl, approximate ages 6-9, shown from mid-torso down — no faces) running through a sunny park meadow in Colorado. Long grass, blue sky, distant foothills. Children are in colorful but simple clothing. The bottom third of the image is open sky and meadow with no people, suitable for Canva text. Art style: joyful lifestyle photography, warm golden hour lighting. No faces visible for privacy.
- **Status:** not_started

**Image Concept 2 — Social (1200x675)**
- **Prompt:** A top-down view of a Colorado Springs park trail — Pikes Peak visible in the far background, framed by pine trees. A pair of children's sneakers visible at the bottom edge of frame, pointing down the trail. The trail curves slightly into the trees. Color palette: Colorado blue sky, pine green, golden path. Bottom middle of image is the open trail, suitable for text. Art style: editorial outdoor adventure photography.
- **Status:** not_started

research.facts:
Outdoor Play Research
| Claim | Confidence | Source(s) |
|-------|-----------|-----------|
| Outdoor play reduces anxiety/depression in children | HIGH | Multiple research/health sources |
| Green settings reduce ADHD symptoms | HIGH | childmind.org + PMC research |
